calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-26-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-26-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial/Prove-up.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patty Lee Hubble.
Jennifer tomlin Sanchez, Esq., for Plaintiff Ocean Angel II, LLC., a California limited liability corp.
No appearance by the Defendant: Thorn's Diesel Services, Inc., a corp.
10:00 am. - Plaintiff's witness Francisco Davi was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
Damages in the amount of $93,939.79
Pre-judgment interest $28,053.00
Costs: pursuant to memorandum of costs.
Total judgment of $121,992.79
Judgment signed in open court.
